reference: I have pain in my lower back that radiates down to my buttocks. I think it started when I was jumping on stacks in the gym. I have had the pain on and off for a couple of months. I thought it might be coming from an old mattress, which I replaced, but the pain is still present. It seems to get worse when I sit for long periods or when I first get up in the morning.
text: I have pain in my lower back, but maybe it's down in my butt. I think it started when I was jumping on the track in the gym. I have had the pain on and off for a couple of months. I thought it might be coming from the old mattress, which I replaced, but the pain is still present. It seems to get worse when I sit too long for example.
